zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡整理
zh.content:
当前BTC/USD报价73791.48美元，24小时微跌0.04%，价格运行于日内低位附近，显示短线买盘动力有所减弱。整体走势呈现高位横盘整理特征，市场观望情绪较浓，多空双方暂未形成明确方向选择。

从技术指标来看，现价低于20周期均线73877.97美元，表明短期趋势略偏空。MACD数值为35.66，仍处于正值区域，说明中期上涨动能尚未完全消失，但缺乏信号线数据，暂无法确认新的金叉或死叉信号。

关键价位方面，73790美元附近构成短线支撑区域，若有效跌破，可能进一步测试73650美元一带。上方阻力首先关注73880美元均线压力，其次是73950至74000美元整数关口，突破后有望重新打开上行空间。

交易策略上，建议以区间交易思路为主，激进投资者可关注支撑位附近的低吸机会，止损设置于73750美元下方。稳健投资者则可等待价格重新站稳20日均线后再考虑顺势做多，以提高交易胜率并控制风险。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin is trading at 73,791.48, hovering near the lower end of the reported daily range between 73,791.44 and 73,876.35. Price action remains mildly bearish in the short term, with the market sitting below the 20-period simple moving average at 73,877.97. This positioning suggests that buyers have lost some momentum, although the extremely narrow trading range indicates consolidation rather than a decisive breakdown. Traders should monitor whether price can reclaim the moving average to signal renewed strength.

The MACD reading of 35.66 remains positive, indicating that underlying momentum has not fully shifted to the downside despite recent weakness. However, the absence of a signal-line value limits confirmation of trend acceleration. RSI data is unavailable, making it difficult to assess overbought or oversold conditions directly. Even so, the combination of a positive MACD and price trading slightly below the SMA points toward a market that is consolidating while searching for directional conviction.

Immediate support is located near the session low around 73,790, which has so far prevented further downside movement. A break below this area could expose additional selling pressure and potentially trigger a move toward lower support zones. On the upside, resistance is evident near 73,876, closely aligned with the 20-period SMA. A sustained breakout above this level would improve the short-term technical outlook and could attract momentum-driven buyers.

From a trading perspective, conservative participants may prefer to wait for confirmation before establishing new positions. A bullish scenario would involve a clear move above 73,876 with increasing volume, targeting higher resistance levels. Conversely, failure to hold support near 73,790 could favor short-term bearish trades. Given the current low-volatility environment and nearly flat 24-hour performance, disciplined risk management and patience remain essential until a stronger directional signal emerges.
